payload.description: The CTO is blocked from expanding the Trigram indexes (EAV-197) because the `eav_writer` role lacks permissions to alter `wshop.pessoas` (owned by `postgres`). Please manually execute the optimization script located at `docs/EAV_DBA_TRIGRAM_EXPANSION_EAV-194.sql` on the Mirror DB (192.168.2.163) as a superuser. Confirm once this is done so we can resume validation.
